'''Jenenma''' was a planet with many [[Starship/Legends|starshipwrights]]. [[The Hutt's Last Laugh]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] was on the planet, as was the headquarters of a syndicate run by [[Pal-Nada]], a [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force adept]].

==Appearances==
